name: TechniScan, Inc.
summary: TechniScan, Inc., a development stage company, engages in the research, development, and commercialization of non-invasive medical imaging products for the detection and diagnosis of breast cancer. It intends to develop the Warm Bath Ultrasound system, an ultrasound-based imaging device that provides radiologists with information about the bulk properties of tissue in the breast, as well as images of the tissue structure. The company is based in Salt Lake City, Utah.
